log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 54/59
→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67

=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 43/59
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 9 vs DC 10]
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
=== ROUND 7 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician.
→ Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician healed for 9 HP. HP: 25/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 23 damage. Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician HP: 2/67
→ Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 9 vs DC 11]
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 7 rounds ===
